background.$description: Off-white clinical — label background, PDP background

primary.$description: Graphite / near-black — product name, brand, metadata values

secondary.$description: Muted graphite — descriptor, module code, other ingredients

tertiary.$description: Zone separators, version strip, metadata labels, FDA disclaimer

maximo.$description: Deep muted red — MAXimo² accent rule ONLY. Never decorative.

maxima.$description: Muted rose — MAXima² accent rule ONLY. Never decorative.

_rules.accent_placement: Under MAXimo²/MAXima² variant name ONLY (Zone 5). NOT under GenoMAX².
_rules.no_additions: No badges, color blocks, gradients, or additional colors permitted.
_rules.brand_writing: Always GenoMAX² — exact casing, superscript ²
